text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Finally... We get to see her in a scrimmage! What a bang to start off
the new year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The winter holidays have wrapped up, and I'm attending a trainers'
meeting in the gym. The atmosphere is buzzing with anticipation,
even more so than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's no wonder. Tomorrow, the rumored debutante runs her first
scrimmage. But the question remains—who will be her trainer?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's a pleasure to be running against you today, everyone. Especially
you, Kita. Thanks for coming! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I threw my hat into the ring as soon as I heard you'd be here! I
couldn't miss your first race!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Since I've debuted already, you get to practice against the real deal!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'd ask you to go easy on me, but you never hold back when it
comes to racing.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm never more serious than on the track! Especially when I'm up against you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The star today is Satono Diamond, whose family runs the Satono Group. Her main competition is no doubt her close friend, the natural-born leader Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone wants to know how good Satono Diamond is—and we're
about to find out, because the race is on!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah! All right, I broke ahead! Now I've just gotta keep my lead!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Still, I'd better watch out for Dia catching up. If there's one thing I
can count on, it's her being hot on my heels!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Kita's so far ahead already! I knew she wouldn't hold back.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Meanwhile, I'm stuck in the middle. Ngh, they're hemming me in. Left
or right, there's no way ahead... But!)

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text:
Father, Mother, I'm going to make you a promise. I'll make our
family's dream come true—just wait and see!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I've trained my whole life for this—learned from so many teachers.
I've practiced and studied so much... and so many people have high
hopes for me!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Be patient. Not yet. I want to dash ahead—I have to—but I need to wait for my chance...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(All right, it's the final turn! I hope I didn't overdo it. Dia's good, but
I've been running like I do in real races...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Ah! Her pace slowed! Now's my chance!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Trainers
text_block_list.text: Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She overtook Kitasan Black... and beat her by a nose! I can't believe
she's still pre-debut—she's incredible!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: She really is a diamond waiting to be polished! I have to be her trainer!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-why's there such a big crowd? Kita?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: They're the trainers who came to see you, silly! Sigh... I'm glad you got the spotlight, but losing still kinda stings.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They're all prospective trainers? Really?! I didn't think so many would
be interested in me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's an honor, everyone—thank you. I'll take this as a sign to work even
harder!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What an incredible racer. She has the instincts to spot just the right
moment to strike and the innate explosiveness to seize it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clearly the result of natural talent and a gifted education. I could
tell the latter left her with a few blind spots... but even those only
speak to her potential to grow.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're a trainer too, right? You looked really into the race. What
do you think? Wasn't Dia amazing?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
She's always been fast, but there's an edge to her lately that's only
getting sharper! I would know, 'cause I'm her number one fan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I listen to Kitasan hype up her friend, I watch Satono Diamond
from a distance. She's the ideal trainee and an infinite well of
potential. But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's also out of my league. Her family runs a massive
conglomerate—they wouldn't give an ordinary trainer a chance, no
matter how passionate.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh? Who's that person Kita's chatting to in the stands?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(A trainer... who really wants to talk to me, it looks like. But then, why
not come over? And there's something different about...)

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Okay, settle down, settle down, trainers! I know you all want Satono
Diamond to sign with you.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
After today's races, the Satono Group will be holding trainer trials.
Participation is open for those wishing to apply.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
G-go figure. I guess Dia's family is making a test out of it. Hey, are
you going to sign up?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wait... what's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I don't go to the trials. I thought about it... but I'm just not
good enough to be her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Group Examiner
text_block_list.text: Onto number twenty-eight—our last candidate. Please enter.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Um... If this person's the last, then that means...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(That one trainer didn't end up coming. I could've sworn they wanted
to talk to me though... What happened?)
